name: Favorite Broccoli Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large salad bowl, combine broccoli, cauliflower, bacon, onion, tomatoes, and eggs. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, sugar, and vinegar until smooth. Chill all ingredients.
3. Just before serving, mix the dressing and pour over the salad. Toss to combine.
